full_text:
Yang Chou 楊醜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Chou (楊醜). Killed his former lord Zhang Yang, for Cao Cao, but in turn was killed by Sui Gu. Yang Chou was affiliated with Zhang Yang. Yang Chou lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

BiographySource Undefined
Yang Chou was a general under Zhang Yang. In the second lunar month of 199, Yang Chou killed his superior, Zhang Yang, and seized his troops. Zhang Yang was planning on attacking Cao Cao at the time, but Yang Chou slew Zhang Yang to ally with Cao Cao. Yang Chou presumably intended to further this alliance, but Sui Gu, who also served under Zhang Yang, slew him.
